name: Community Credit Union of Lynn
description_short: Rockland Federal Credit Union (RFCU) is a Massachusetts-based, member-owned credit union offering personal and business banking, lending, and financial services to eligible members.
description_long:
Rockland Federal Credit Union (RFCU) is a federally chartered, member-owned credit union operating in Massachusetts. The organization has recently completed a digital experience refresh and actively promotes member ownership and engagement through educational resources and community initiatives. RFCU serves both personal and business members with a focus on relationship banking and member benefits.

RFCU offers comprehensive personal banking services including checking and savings accounts, money market accounts, and credit cards. On the lending side, they provide auto loans, mortgage loans (including jumbo loans up to $2 million), home equity loans and lines of credit, personal loans, and share certificates. The credit union also supports business members with business checking and savings accounts, equipment financing, business lines of credit, and investment real estate loans. Additional services include online and mobile banking, loan payment centers, skip-a-payment options, debit and ATM cards, and overdraft options.

What distinguishes RFCU is its recent recognition as the best credit union in Massachusetts by Forbes, reflecting member satisfaction and service quality. The organization emphasizes accessibility (AudioEye enabled website), educational support through live workshops and calculators, and member benefits beyond standard banking including TruStage Insurance, BridgeUp Financial Assistance, and pet insurance. Their routing number is 211373348, and they maintain multiple branch locations across Massachusetts with appointment scheduling available.

RFCU operates as a traditional credit union with competitive rates and member-focused services. However, membership eligibility requirements apply (standard for credit unions), and the website does not clearly outline all membership criteria. As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, some consumers may need to verify membership eligibility before applying for accounts or loans.
services: Personal savings accounts and money market accounts
Mortgage loans and jumbo mortgage loans (up to $2 million)
Home equity loans and lines of credit
pros: Voted best credit union in Massachusetts by Forbes
Offers jumbo mortgage loans up to $2 million for larger borrowing needs
Competitive rates across multiple products (mortgage APR as low as 5.82%, auto loans as low as 5.39%)
Comprehensive service offerings for both personal and business members
Accessible digital banking with AudioEye accessibility optimization
Educational resources including live workshops, calculators, and FAQs
Additional member benefits like BridgeUp Financial Assistance, TruStage Insurance, and pet insurance
cons: Membership eligibility requirements not clearly detailed on website (standard credit union limitation)
Geographic focus on Massachusetts may limit accessibility for out-of-state members
No 24/7 live customer support phone line information provided (main number: 800-562-7328)
best_for: Massachusetts residents and businesses seeking competitive lending rates and member-owned financial services
Home buyers looking for jumbo mortgage options up to $2 million
Business owners needing equipment financing and lines of credit
Members prioritizing member ownership structure and community-focused financial institutions
diagnosis: RFCU is best for Massachusetts-based individuals and business owners seeking competitive rates, comprehensive lending options, and member-owned financial services. The primary consideration is verifying membership eligibility before opening accounts, as credit union membership requirements vary by institution and may not be universally accessible.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.

meta_description: Community Credit Union of Lynn — NCUA-insured credit union in LYNN, MA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
